author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أبو بكر محمد بن إبراهيم بن المنذر النيسابوري
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent jurist and hadith scholar known for his works in comparative fiqh.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A significant work in comparative fiqh, presenting the views of various jurists alongside evidence from hadith and Quran.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the earliest and most comprehensive works in comparative fiqh, widely referenced by later scholars.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Abdullah bin Abdulaziz al-Jibreen is a respected scholar and editor known for his meticulous work in Islamic texts.
